nf/quick-333-add-requirement-mappings-fo.task_description: Implement 3 targeted TLA+ failure classifiers in F->C remediation layer
nf/quick-333-add-requirement-mappings-fo.approach: Create bin/classify-tlc-failure.cjs with 3 pattern-matched detectors for deadlock, semantic errors, and fairness gaps to auto-fix common TLC failures in the F->C remediation layer without LLM dispatch.
out_of_scope: Implementing additional failure detectors beyond the 3 specified
Modifying the quorum layer or verification dispatch logic outside of solve-remediate.md F->C section
Refactoring the entire solve-remediate.md workflow or step architecture
